title: Navigate to Cloud Provider Observability for AWS

blocks.content:
In this milestone, you'll access the Cloud provider AWS configuration interface in Grafana Cloud. This interface provides the central location for managing your AWS monitoring setup, including authentication, service selection, and dashboard deployment.

The Cloud provider AWS configuration interface streamlines the integration process by providing guided setup steps to ensure your connection works correctly.

Make sure you're signed in to your Grafana Cloud environment, for example `mystack.grafana.net`.
Open the navigation menu and click **Observability > Cloud provider > AWS**.
On the **AWS** page, click the **Configuration** tab.

The Cloud provider AWS configuration page includes multiple options including authentication and setup instructions. This page guides you through the process of connecting your AWS account and selecting which services to monitor.

In your next milestone, you'll create the required AWS IAM role that allows Grafana Cloud to access your AWS metrics.
